Setlist
Longest Shows by Song Time
This is a list of every show the band has played whose total performance time (i.e., not including down time between songs) is at least 2 hours 45 minutes.

Alpine Valley makes the most appearances on this list, with five shows. Runners-up are SPAC and The Gorge, with three each.

Shows from the 2015 tour are very well-represented here due to the two-set format the band used on that tour; surprisingly, though, there are only three shows from 2014, the other recent year in which the band played two sets.

It is quite possible that there are some shows from the band's early days that would make the list if a recording were available.
Rank Total Song Time Show Date Venue & Location Songs 10+ Min. Songs Longest Song Length Release
